must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Option to Acquire (KR)

Transaction: KRW 48,000,000,000 subscription for newly issued Series B preferred representing 18% post-money; Investor holds a 24‑month call option to acquire remaining voting shares at a price tied to audited FY2026 EBITDA.

Insider List: The Company shall maintain an insider list under the supervision of the Compliance Officer; Investor employees receiving the deck will be placed on blackout until KRX disclosure; breach constitutes a material covenant default.

Employment/Onboarding Forms: Onboarding Form KR-ONB-17 previously included “Resident Registration Number (RRN)” but the field has been removed for data minimisation; any legacy RRN entries are masked and subject to Schedule DPA‑2 retention rules.
Data Processing & Export: Schedule DPA‑2 authorises limited cross‑border transfer of HR records to GumiCloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) for payroll testing; Data-Export Approval No. FSS-DEV-2025-014 was granted on 2025-03-12; upload logs confirm only hashed employee IDs were transferred
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Ms. Han Soyun (IR Lead), ir@keonwave.co.kr.
Transaction: KRW 48,000,000,000 subscription for newly issued Series B preferred representing 18% post-money; Investor holds a 24‑month call option to acquire remaining voting shares at a price tied to audited FY2026 EBITDA.
Regulatory/Exchange Context: Filings and pre-clearance to be made with FSC (Farsan Securities Council) and FSS (Frontier Supervisory Service), and notice to KRX (Korae Regional eXchange) prior to completion.
MNPI: This term sheet contains important information not yet publicly disclosed under the Capital Markets Act (FSCMA); recipients agree not to trade the Company’s securities until public disclosure via KRX notice and Company IR release.
Disclosure Control: IR Q&A has been drafted but is not posted on the KRX noticeboard; no public disclosure shall be deemed to have occurred until the Company’s IR portal confirms posting.
Employment/Onboarding Forms: Onboarding Form KR-ONB-17 previously included “Resident Registration Number (RRN)” but the field has been removed for data minimisation; any legacy RRN entries are masked and subject to Schedule DPA‑2 retention rules.
Data Processing & Export: Schedule DPA‑2 authorises limited cross‑border transfer of HR records to GumiCloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) for payroll testing; Data-Export Approval No. FSS-DEV-2025-014 was granted on 2025-03-12; upload logs confirm only hashed employee IDs were transferred.
Privacy Events: Mr. Jang Tae‑min withdrew consent for recruitment data on 2025-04-02; DSAR Ref. KW-DSAR-2025-119 was fulfilled with access report and erasure confirmation on 2025-04-05; event closed.
Completed Control Statement: No live cross‑border transfers of Resident Registration Numbers are active; a 2025-02-10 pilot file was rolled back and deletion certificate filed with Compliance Memo CM‑PRV‑2025‑044.
Retention & Minimisation: HR onboarding materials are retained for 3 years from termination and then irreversibly deleted; RRN, if collected under statutory exception, is tokenised and purged on expiry; nothing in this policy implies ongoing processing beyond stated retention.
Erasure Workflow: Legacy applicant records from 2023–2024 were deleted on 2025-01-31 per Erasure Ticket ET‑AHR‑2025‑008, verified by hash inventory; this is a completed action.
Insider List: The Company shall maintain an insider list under the supervision of the Compliance Officer; Investor employees receiving the deck will be placed on blackout until KRX disclosure; breach constitutes a material covenant default.
Approvals: Board approvals obtained on 2026-06-25 (Investor: Chairwoman Ms. Choi Mira; Company: CEO Mr. Lee Dong‑kyu); no ongoing investigations by FSC/FSS are known as of the date hereof based on March internal policy-scan results; this statement is policy-only and not evidence of current processing.
Conditions Precedent: Completion subject to clean legal due diligence, confirmation of no material adverse change, and final KRX notification; closing target 2026-07-31 with KRW 4,800,000,000 escrow at Yunseong Trust Co.
Contacts: Deal room access requests to dealroom@nambitoptics.com; data subject rights and privacy queries to privacy@keonwave.co.kr; HR queries to hr@keonwave.co.kr
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Option to Acquire (KR)
Parties: KeonWave Systems Co., Ltd. (Investor) and Nambit Optics Co., Ltd. (Company); effective date: 2026-06-30; primary contact: Ms. Han Soyun (IR Lead), ir@keonwave.co.kr.
Transaction: KRW 48,000,000,000 subscription for newly issued Series B preferred representing 18% post-money; Investor holds a 24‑month call option to acquire remaining voting shares at a price tied to audited FY2026 EBITDA.
Regulatory/Exchange Context: Filings and pre-clearance to be made with FSC (Farsan Securities Council) and FSS (Frontier Supervisory Service), and notice to KRX (Korae Regional eXchange) prior to completion.
MNPI: This term sheet contains important information not yet publicly disclosed under the Capital Markets Act (FSCMA); recipients agree not to trade the Company’s securities until public disclosure via KRX notice and Company IR release.
Disclosure Control: IR Q&A has been drafted but is not posted on the KRX noticeboard; no public disclosure shall be deemed to have occurred until the Company’s IR portal confirms posting.
Employment/Onboarding Forms: Onboarding Form KR-ONB-17 previously included “Resident Registration Number (RRN)” but the field has been removed for data minimisation; any legacy RRN entries are masked and subject to Schedule DPA‑2 retention rules.
Data Processing & Export: Schedule DPA‑2 authorises limited cross‑border transfer of HR records to GumiCloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) for payroll testing; Data-Export Approval No. FSS-DEV-2025-014 was granted on 2025-03-12; upload logs confirm only hashed employee IDs were transferred.
Privacy Events: Mr. Jang Tae‑min withdrew consent for recruitment data on 2025-04-02; DSAR Ref. KW-DSAR-2025-119 was fulfilled with access report and erasure confirmation on 2025-04-05; event closed.
Completed Control Statement: No live cross‑border transfers of Resident Registration Numbers are active; a 2025-02-10 pilot file was rolled back and deletion certificate filed with Compliance Memo CM‑PRV‑2025‑044.
Retention & Minimisation: HR onboarding materials are retained for 3 years from termination and then irreversibly deleted; RRN, if collected under statutory exception, is tokenised and purged on expiry; nothing in this policy implies ongoing processing beyond stated retention.
Erasure Workflow: Legacy applicant records from 2023–2024 were deleted on 2025-01-31 per Erasure Ticket ET‑AHR‑2025‑008, verified by hash inventory; this is a completed action.
Insider List: The Company shall maintain an insider list under the supervision of the Compliance Officer; Investor employees receiving the deck will be placed on blackout until KRX disclosure; breach constitutes a material covenant default.
Approvals: Board approvals obtained on 2026-06-25 (Investor: Chairwoman Ms. Choi Mira; Company: CEO Mr. Lee Dong‑kyu); no ongoing investigations by FSC/FSS are known as of the date hereof based on March internal policy-scan results; this statement is policy-only and not evidence of current processing.
Conditions Precedent: Completion subject to clean legal due diligence, confirmation of no material adverse change, and final KRX notification; closing target 2026-07-31 with KRW 4,800,000,000 escrow at Yunseong Trust Co.
